libraries.name: GSAP
libraries.usage: Timeline animations, scroll-driven content reveals, spring physics for seal stamp micro-feedback

libraries.name: GSAP ScrollTrigger
libraries.usage: Scroll-based element reveal triggers for quill-stroke write-in effect

libraries.name: Tippy.js
libraries.usage: Parchment-scroll themed tooltips with custom gold/navy styling

libraries.name: Splitting.js
libraries.usage: Per-character splitting of view titles for staggered calligraphic reveal animation

views.label: Manuscript Dashboard
contentElements: 4 metric cards with gold-ink numbers (commissions, revenue, ink varieties, pending orders)
5-item recent studio activity feed with seal avatars
3-item deadline timeline with urgency indicators

views.label: Letter Collections
contentElements: 6 project cards as sealed letters
Wax seal status indicators (gold/white/navy)
Calligraphic category tags and due dates

views.label: Writing Desk
contentElements: Project brief parchment panel with 5 spec rows
6-item task/milestone checklist with toggle states
Ink well tool sidebar with 4 ink swatches
Nib rack listing 4 pen nibs
Notes pad with client-specific details

views.label: Correspondence Board
contentElements: 4 columns: Draft (3), Addressing (2), Sealed (2), Delivered (2)
9 total kanban cards with wax seal status marks
Each card has title, description, category tag, and date

views.label: Ink Wash Canvas
contentElements: 7 draggable nodes with ink-blot shapes
5 SVG ink-trail connection paths with blur filter
Nodes categorized as primary, secondary, and accent

views.label: Manuscript Marginalia
contentElements: 5 entity blocks (Commission, Piece, Material, Nib Profile, Ink Batch)
Each entity has 5 fields with PK/FK gold-leaf markers
Relationship annotations (has many, uses, selects)

views.label: Book of Contents
contentElements: 5 collapsible chapter groups
Multiple nested section entries with file details
Leaf items with file sizes and modification dates

views.label: Inspirations Cabinet
contentElements: 6 idea index cards with ink-wash watermarks
Each card has title, detailed description, category tag, date, and priority level
Priority indicators (High/Medium/Low)

views.label: The Scribe
contentElements: 6 message exchanges (3 AI, 3 user)
AI messages styled as formal letters on navy parchment
User messages on cream with gold border
Chat input with send button and keyboard support
Ink-blot message dividers

views.label: Scribe's Preferences
contentElements: 3 settings groups (Appearance, Studio Defaults, Notifications)
4 toggle switches with ink-flow animation
2 range sliders for parchment darkness and gold intensity
3 select dropdowns for script style, paper weight, and alert timing
Save and reset action buttons with gold seal confirmation
